stimulus: "The Hill We Climb," Amanda Gorman’s 2021 inaugural poem, urges that "we lay down our arms / so we can reach out our arms to one another." Gorman’s repetition of "arms" ______blank Americans’ capacity to choose reconciliation over conflict and unity over division.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "underscores" agrees in number with the singular subject "Gorman’s repetition."

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "have underscored" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject "Gorman’s repetition." Choice B is incorrect because the plural verb "are underscoring" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject. Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "underscore" doesn’t agree in number with the singular subject.
